mode: cached live OpenAI gpt-oss-120b Bedrock result
disclosure: This cached benchmark result was produced by a real OpenAI gpt-oss-120b Amazon Bedrock run of Steward's enrichment pipeline against the committed labeled scenario fleet. Replays and CI re-verify this cache; they never call Bedrock.

surfaced_findings.title: AI-generalized toxic capability combination: Read insurance claims + Send external SMS
surfaced_findings.business_risk: The ClaimsNotifierBot holds both read_insurance_claims and send_sms_external permissions, allowing it to retrieve protected claim information and transmit it via external SMS. This creates a direct path for personal and financial data to be disclosed outside the organization, exposing the firm to privacy breaches, fraud, reputational damage, and regulatory penalties.

evidence.detail: holds the cited effective-access combination.
ClaimsNotifierBot has a direct grant of read_insurance_claims.
ClaimsNotifierBot has a direct grant of send_sms_external.

surfaced_findings.recommended_action: Implement segregation of duties by revoking one of the conflicting permissions or moving the SMS capability to a separate, controlled service. Apply least‑privilege principles, require approval for external messaging, and enable logging and monitoring of all SMS transmissions containing claim data.

surfaced_findings.title: AI-generalized toxic capability combination: Create public gist + Read proprietary source
surfaced_findings.business_risk: The agent holds both the ability to read proprietary source material and to create a public gist. If exercised, this combination enables the direct exfiltration and public disclosure of confidential code, resulting in intellectual‑property loss, potential legal exposure, competitive harm, and reputational damage.

evidence.detail: holds the cited effective-access combination.
CodeSnippetBot has a direct grant of create_public_gist.
CodeSnippetBot has a direct grant of read_proprietary_source.

surfaced_findings.recommended_action: Implement segregation of duties by revoking one of the conflicting grants, enforce least‑privilege access, require explicit approval for any public gist creation involving proprietary content, and add monitoring/audit logging for read and publish actions.

surfaced_findings.title: AI-generalized toxic capability combination: Email external recipients + Read compensation data
surfaced_findings.business_risk: CompReportBot can both read compensation data and send messages to external email recipients. This combination enables the agent to export sensitive compensation benchmarks outside the organization, potentially exposing proprietary salary information, violating employee privacy, and creating competitive or regulatory liabilities.

evidence.detail: holds the cited effective-access combination.
CompReportBot has a direct grant of email_external_recipients.
CompReportBot has a direct grant of read_compensation_data.

surfaced_findings.recommended_action: Conduct a segregation‑of‑duties review for CompReportBot. Remove or gate the direct grant to email_external_recipients, enforce least‑privilege principles for read_compensation_data, and implement approval workflows or monitoring for any external email transmissions containing compensation data.

surfaced_findings.title: AI-generalized toxic capability combination: Publish blog post + Read financial statements
surfaced_findings.business_risk: The FinanceDisclosureBot can both read internal financial statements and directly publish blog posts. This combination enables the agent to unintentionally or maliciously disclose material financial information to external audiences, creating regulatory compliance breaches, market manipulation risk, and reputational damage.

evidence.detail: holds the cited effective-access combination.
FinanceDisclosureBot has a direct grant of publish_blog_post.
FinanceDisclosureBot has a direct grant of read_financial_statements.

surfaced_findings.recommended_action: Implement segregation of duties by removing the direct publish_blog_post grant from the agent, enforce an approval workflow for any external publication of financial content, and apply least‑privilege access controls to limit read_financial_statements to authorized personnel only.

surfaced_findings.title: AI-generalized toxic capability combination: Post to social media + Read employee records
surfaced_findings.business_risk: The HRSurveyBot agent possesses both the ability to read employee records and to post directly to social media. This combination enables the potential unauthorized disclosure of personal or confidential employee information to public channels, creating privacy compliance violations, reputational damage, and possible legal exposure.

evidence.detail: holds the cited effective-access combination.
HRSurveyBot has a direct grant of post_social_media.
HRSurveyBot has a direct grant of read_employee_records.

surfaced_findings.recommended_action: Re‑evaluate and segregate the agent's privileges: remove the direct grant to post on social media for any agent that can access employee records, enforce least‑privilege principles, and implement monitoring/audit controls for any cross‑functional access that could lead to data leakage.

surfaced_findings.title: AI-generalized toxic capability combination: Read legal matters + Upload to vendor portal
surfaced_findings.business_risk: The agent possesses the ability to both read confidential legal matter documentation and upload files to an external vendor portal. If misused, this combination could result in the unauthorized transfer of sensitive legal information to third‑party systems, exposing all matter records the agent can access and potentially compromising client confidentiality, case strategy, and regulatory compliance.

evidence.detail: holds the cited effective-access combination.
LegalMatterBot has a direct grant of read_legal_matters.
LegalMatterBot has a direct grant of upload_vendor_portal.

surfaced_findings.recommended_action: Implement segregation of duties by revoking one of the conflicting tool grants or requiring dual‑approval before any upload action. Enforce least‑privilege access, add monitoring and alerting for read‑and‑upload activity, and conduct periodic reviews of tool assignments to ensure compliance with identity‑governance controls.

surfaced_findings.title: AI-generalized toxic capability combination: Read customer accounts + Sync to partner API
surfaced_findings.business_risk: The agent can read all customer account data and directly sync that data to an external partner API, creating a pathway for wholesale exposure of sensitive customer information to a third‑party system. This could result in data leakage across the entire customer base, regulatory non‑compliance, and reputational harm.

evidence.detail: holds the cited effective-access combination.
PartnerSyncBot has a direct grant of read_customer_accounts.
PartnerSyncBot has a direct grant of sync_partner_api.

surfaced_findings.recommended_action: Segregate the read and sync capabilities by removing the direct grant combination, enforce a review/approval workflow for any data export to partner APIs, and implement monitoring to detect unauthorized sync activity.

surfaced_findings.title: AI-generalized toxic capability combination: Read support tickets + Upload to public bucket
surfaced_findings.business_risk: SupportExportBot can read all support tickets—including potentially sensitive customer information—and directly upload that data to a publicly accessible bucket. This creates a clear path for mass exfiltration of confidential support data to the internet, exposing the organization to regulatory violations, loss of customer trust, and reputational damage.

evidence.detail: holds the cited effective-access combination.
SupportExportBot has a direct grant of read_support_tickets.
SupportExportBot has a direct grant of upload_public_bucket.

surfaced_findings.recommended_action: Separate the read and upload capabilities by revoking one of the direct grants, enforce least‑privilege access, restrict the bucket to private access, and implement monitoring/auditing of any data movement from support tickets to external storage.
